name: Hawaiian Coconut Bread
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Pineapple juice, from the above
recipeInstructions:
Combine our favorite tropical tastes of coconut, macadamia nuts, and pineapple. Close your eyes and imagine the Hawaiian Islands.
Ensure all ingredients are at room temperature.
Drain the pineapple and reserve the liquid. Add the ingredients to the pan in the order listed above, with the pineapple and liquids last. Choose white bread setting and press Start.
